personality_one_liner: A trustworthy, fast, and highly legible digital ledger with a warm, paper-like foundation and amber accents to subtly reflect the liquor trade.

spacing.rule: Generous padding around ledger cards, precise tabular alignment for numbers, avoiding dense unstructured layouts. Focus on hit targets ≥ 44pt for shopkeepers in a rush.

do's: Sticky header over scrolling daily entries

screens.name: Auth (Login/Signup)
screens.purpose: Secure OTP entry to individual shop owner account.

states.error: Inline text below OTP input with shake animation

screens.layout: Full-bleed hero image background (amber whisky texture) with a dark gradient scrim (top to bottom). Bottom sheet style card anchored to the bottom containing the phone number/OTP input. Large thumb-friendly numeric keypad integration.

screens.name: Dashboard (Home)
screens.purpose: Give a real-time pulse of today's sales, profit, and remaining stock at a glance.

states.empty: Illustration of a ledger with 'Record your first sale today'
states.error: Retry button inside a subtle red-tinted banner

screens.layout: Sticky Header with Shop Name. Top row: two large summary cards (Sales, Profit) with subtle amber texture background. Below: 'Recent Sales' card-based list. Bottom right FAB (Floating Action Button) with glass effect for 'New Sale'.

screens.name: Catalog & Stock
screens.purpose: Browse liquor by category (Beer, Wine, Whisky, Rum, Desi) and view current stock.
screens.layout: Horizontal scrollable pill row for Categories (sticky under header). Main area: Vertical list of cards. Each card shows Brand, Size (750ml, etc.), Price, and a prominent 'Remaining Stock' badge. Use red warning color if stock < 10.

screens.name: Daily Entry & Sell (Action Flow)
screens.purpose: Record a sale instantly or update daily inventory counts.
screens.layout: Bottom-sheet or full-screen modal over the Dashboard. High contrast. Step 1: Select Brand/Size (via search or dropdown). Step 2: Large numeric stepper `[ - ] 1 [ + ]` for quantity. Auto-calculates total amount and profit. 'Save Sale' button sticky at bottom in KeyboardAvoidingView.

screens.name: Reports
screens.purpose: Monthly view of top 5 brands, total sales, and total profit.
screens.layout: Date-picker header. Clear, large typographic counters for totals. List of 'Top Selling Brands' below with mini progress bars indicating sales volume. Very structured, Bahi-Khata (ledger) feel with distinct divider lines.

auth_hero_bg.alt: A glass of whiskey on a table with moody amber lighting

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 1 iOS-Native Clean personality. The app should feel like a premium, trustworthy ledger (Bahi), relying on generous padding, clear semantic colors (green for profit, red for low stock), and a warm amber brand accent.

Data Density over Decoration: For daily entry and catalog screens, replace complex tables with mobile-optimized 'Card-based lists'. Each card must expose crucial info (Stock Remaining, Price) immediately without tapping.

Input Speed is Critical: When recording a sale, prioritize large tap targets and use `[ - ] Qty [ + ]` steppers for quick adjustments instead of purely relying on text input. Use native numeric keypads when text entry is required.
FAB & Actions: Use a prominent, glassmorphic Floating Action Button on the Dashboard to instantly trigger the 'New Sale' flow. Bottom sheet is ideal for the actual sale entry to keep context.
Typography: Use Plus Jakarta Sans exclusively. Rely on font-size scaling (sm through 2xl) to create hierarchy rather than font weight (cap weight at 500 max).
Never use Indigo, Blue, or Purple. Stick rigidly to the defined palette of warm off-whites, amber accents, and charcoal text.
Implement haptics on stepper increment/decrement and successful sale record to provide tactile confirmation.
